display_text: Flicker, Cost: 0 / Neutral Item: Provides +35 Movement Speed and an active that dispels debuffs and blinks you forward between 200-600 range. If cast within 3 seconds of receiving player damage, it blinks in place instead of forward. This makes it a reliable, albeit random-range, self-dispel escape tool that can be used even while taking damage. Stats: CD: 5s, MS Bonus: +35.
